mapper.insert: insert into T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING (L_ID, L_RULE_NO, C_CONTROL_TYPE, C_PORT_TYPE, VC_PORT_CODE, D_MODIFY_TIME, C_VALID_STATUS) values (#{lId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lRuleNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cControlType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cPortType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcPortCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dModifyTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{cValidStatus,jdbcType=CHAR})
mapper.select: select L_ID, L_RULE_NO, C_CONTROL_TYPE, C_PORT_TYPE, VC_PORT_CODE, D_MODIFY_TIME, C_VALID_STATUS from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING

select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '1' AND C_CONTROL_TYPE = '0' and VC_PORT_CODE = #{code}
union
(select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '2' AND C_CONTROL_TYPE = '0' and VC_PORT_CODE in ( select L_ASSET_ID from TRADE.TASSET where L_FUND_ID = #{code} ) )
union
( select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '3' AND C_CONTROL_TYPE = '0' and VC_PORT_CODE in ( select L_COMBI_ID from TRADE.TCOMBI where L_FUND_ID = #{code} ) )
union
( select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '1' and VC_PORT_CODE in ( SELECT DISTINCT VC_SPE_PORT_CODE FROM t_comp_specialportinfo a WHERE VC_SUB_PORT_CODE = #{code} AND C_VALID_STATUS = '1' AND VC_SPE_PORT_CODE LIKE 'SPE%' ) )
UNION
( select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '1' AND C_CONTROL_TYPE = '1' and VC_PORT_CODE in ( SELECT DISTINCT VC_SPE_PORT_CODE FROM t_comp_specialportinfo a WHERE VC_SUB_PORT_CODE = #{code} AND C_VALID_STATUS = '1' ) )

select.if:
select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '1' AND C_CONTROL_TYPE = '0' and VC_PORT_CODE in (select distinct vc_fund_id_o32 from PRT_PORTINFO where VC_PORT_TYPE_1 = '年金')
union
(select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '2' AND C_CONTROL_TYPE = '0' and VC_PORT_CODE in ( select L_ASSET_ID from TRADE.TASSET where L_FUND_ID IN (select distinct vc_fund_id_o32 from PRT_PORTINFO where VC_PORT_TYPE_1 = '年金')
) )
union
( select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '3' AND C_CONTROL_TYPE = '0' and VC_PORT_CODE in ( select L_COMBI_ID from TRADE.TCOMBI where L_FUND_ID in (select distinct vc_fund_id_o32 from PRT_PORTINFO where VC_PORT_TYPE_1 = '年金') ) )
union
( select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '1' and VC_PORT_CODE in ( SELECT DISTINCT VC_SPE_PORT_CODE FROM t_comp_specialportinfo a WHERE VC_SUB_PORT_CODE in (select distinct vc_fund_id_o32 from PRT_PORTINFO where VC_PORT_TYPE_1 = '年金') AND C_VALID_STATUS = '1' AND VC_SPE_PORT_CODE LIKE 'SPE%' ) )
UNION
( select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '1' AND C_CONTROL_TYPE = '1' and VC_PORT_CODE in ( SELECT DISTINCT VC_SPE_PORT_CODE FROM t_comp_specialportinfo a WHERE VC_SUB_PORT_CODE in (select distinct vc_fund_id_o32 from PRT_PORTINFO where VC_PORT_TYPE_1 = '年金') AND C_VALID_STATUS = '1' ) )

select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '1' AND C_CONTROL_TYPE = '0' and VC_PORT_CODE in (select distinct vc_fund_id_o32 from PRT_PORTINFO where VC_PORT_TYPE_1 in ('保险') and vc_fund_id_o32 is not null AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE (VC_FUND_ID_O32,'[A-Z]'))
union
(select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '2' AND C_CONTROL_TYPE = '0' and VC_PORT_CODE in ( select L_ASSET_ID from TRADE.TASSET where L_FUND_ID IN (select distinct vc_fund_id_o32 from PRT_PORTINFO where VC_PORT_TYPE_1 in ('保险') and vc_fund_id_o32 is not null AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE (VC_FUND_ID_O32,'[A-Z]'))
) )
union
( select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '3' AND C_CONTROL_TYPE = '0' and VC_PORT_CODE in ( select L_COMBI_ID from TRADE.TCOMBI where L_FUND_ID in (select distinct vc_fund_id_o32 from PRT_PORTINFO where VC_PORT_TYPE_1 in ('保险') and vc_fund_id_o32 is not null AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE (VC_FUND_ID_O32,'[A-Z]')) ) )
union
( select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '1' and VC_PORT_CODE in ( SELECT DISTINCT VC_SPE_PORT_CODE FROM t_comp_specialportinfo a WHERE VC_SUB_PORT_CODE in (select distinct vc_fund_id_o32 from PRT_PORTINFO where VC_PORT_TYPE_1 in ('保险') and vc_fund_id_o32 is not null AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE (VC_FUND_ID_O32,'[A-Z]')) AND C_VALID_STATUS = '1' AND VC_SPE_PORT_CODE LIKE 'SPE%' ) )
UNION
( select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '1' AND C_CONTROL_TYPE = '1' and VC_PORT_CODE in ( SELECT DISTINCT VC_SPE_PORT_CODE FROM t_comp_specialportinfo a WHERE VC_SUB_PORT_CODE in (select distinct vc_fund_id_o32 from PRT_PORTINFO where VC_PORT_TYPE_1 in ('保险') and vc_fund_id_o32 is not null AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE (VC_FUND_ID_O32,'[A-Z]')) AND C_VALID_STATUS = '1' ) )

select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '1' AND C_CONTROL_TYPE = '0' and VC_PORT_CODE in (select distinct vc_fund_id_o32 from PRT_PORTINFO where VC_PORT_TYPE_1 in ('第三方') and vc_fund_id_o32 is not null AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE (VC_FUND_ID_O32,'[A-Z]'))
union
(select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '2' AND C_CONTROL_TYPE = '0' and VC_PORT_CODE in ( select L_ASSET_ID from TRADE.TASSET where L_FUND_ID IN (select distinct vc_fund_id_o32 from PRT_PORTINFO where VC_PORT_TYPE_1 in ('第三方') and vc_fund_id_o32 is not null AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE (VC_FUND_ID_O32,'[A-Z]'))
) )
union
( select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '3' AND C_CONTROL_TYPE = '0' and VC_PORT_CODE in ( select L_COMBI_ID from TRADE.TCOMBI where L_FUND_ID in (select distinct vc_fund_id_o32 from PRT_PORTINFO where VC_PORT_TYPE_1 in ('第三方') and vc_fund_id_o32 is not null AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE (VC_FUND_ID_O32,'[A-Z]')) ) )
union
( select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '1' and VC_PORT_CODE in ( SELECT DISTINCT VC_SPE_PORT_CODE FROM t_comp_specialportinfo a WHERE VC_SUB_PORT_CODE in (select distinct vc_fund_id_o32 from PRT_PORTINFO where VC_PORT_TYPE_1 in ('第三方') and vc_fund_id_o32 is not null AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE (VC_FUND_ID_O32,'[A-Z]')) AND C_VALID_STATUS = '1' AND VC_SPE_PORT_CODE LIKE 'SPE%' ) )
UNION
( select L_RULE_NO from T_COMP_RULEPORTBINDING where 1=1
and C_PORT_TYPE = '1' AND C_CONTROL_TYPE = '1' and VC_PORT_CODE in ( SELECT DISTINCT VC_SPE_PORT_CODE FROM t_comp_specialportinfo a WHERE VC_SUB_PORT_CODE in (select distinct vc_fund_id_o32 from PRT_PORTINFO where VC_PORT_TYPE_1 in ('第三方') and vc_fund_id_o32 is not null AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE (VC_FUND_ID_O32,'[A-Z]')) AND C_VALID_STATUS = '1' ) )
